elements.description: ลูกนอนไฟเบอร์ซีเมนต์ ขนาด 1"x12" -- fiber-cement tread board, 1x12 inch
ลูกตั้งไฟเบอร์ซีเมนต์ หนา 1" -- fiber-cement riser board, 1 inch thick

warnings: Third of 3 views on this page; siblings are the full stair section (_view1_st3_section.json) and railing detail (_view2_st3_railing_detail.json).

This fiber-cement tread/riser finish is applied over the RC structural stair slab documented on structural sheets S-11/S-12 (which shows a solid 0.15m RC slab with diagonal rebar) -- i.e. this is a finish-layer detail, not a different structural system. Differs from houses #1-#3's typical ceramic-tile stair finish; worth noting as a material variation for this house.
